content.text: {"epics":[{"title":"Real-Time Cross-Border Settlement","description":"Replace nightly COBOL batch with TIPS/SEPA Instant rails.","business_value":"Reduce settlement latency from 14h to <60s.","priority":"Critical","components":["payments-rail","settlement-engine"]},{"title":"Inline AML Screening","description":"Wire existing AML engine v3.2 into the new real-time flow.","business_value":"Maintain regulatory compliance.","priority":"High","components":["aml","payments-rail"]}]}
